info.title: trxml
info.description:
Copyright (c) 2023 Ken Domino
# trxml
## Summary
Print a parse tree in XML structured format
## Description
Read a tree from stdin and write an XML represenation of it.
## Usage
trxml
## Examples
trparse A.g4 | trxml
## Current version
0.23.42 Fixes to trgen templates.

-v, --verbose
--version
